overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV showing the protagonist jogging through an urban waterfront promenade, transitioning across an elevated bridge with traffic, and entering Pelham Bay Park. The clip progresses from a built-up residential area to open green space under bright midday sun.

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along the waterfront sidewalk past seated pedestrians on benches

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a red park bench facing the water

entered.detail: multi-story brick residential building with fire escapes and awnings
black metal railing separating walkway from water
classic black lamppost along the promenade

segments.scene_description: The character jogs along a concrete waterfront promenade bordered by a brick apartment building on the right and a metal fence overlooking water on the left. Several park benches line the path, with NPCs seated and relaxing. The scene is shaded by trees with dappled sunlight on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge walkway alongside multi-lane traffic

events.description: character turns right from waterfront promenade onto bridge walkway with traffic
multiple vehicles including a white van and sedan pass by on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing to jog along the bridge sidewalk next to moving traffic

notable_agents.action: white van driving past on the bridge road

entered.detail: multi-lane bridge road with yellow dividing lines
low concrete wall separating sidewalk from drop
elevated highway structure crossing above the roadway

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto an elevated bridge walkway with full sky exposure. To the left, vehicles travel along the asphalt road, while concrete barriers line the right side. The environment opens up significantly compared to the enclosed promenade, with distant city structures visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: park entrance pathway with sports fields

events.description: turning left off the bridge into the park entrance area
passing the Welham Parkway sign marking entrance to Pelham Bay Park

agents.ego_description: jogging into the park past the entrance sign toward green recreational fields

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrians walking on the grass near the sports field

entered.detail: large wooden sign with white text marking park entrance
open green field with white markings for sports activities
stone wall with decorative pillars marking park boundary
tall pine tree casting shadows on the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters Pelham Bay Park, transitioning from urban infrastructure to green space. The gravel path leads past the Welham Parkway entrance sign toward open sports fields. Tall trees provide shade over the pathway, and a few distant pedestrians are visible enjoying the park grounds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a shaded urban promenade into the wide-open greenery of a public park. It begins with the character jogging along a concrete waterfront path, flanked by a brick apartment building and a metal fence under the dappled sunlight of overhanging trees. As the path leads forward, the scene opens up onto an elevated bridge walkway, shifting from the enclosed promenade to a bright, exposed environment with flowing vehicle traffic and distant city structures. The camera then follows the character as they leave the urban infrastructure behind, passing the Welham Parkway entrance sign to enter Pelham Bay Park. Finally, the concrete gives way to a gravel path that winds through tall trees and opens toward expansive sports fields under the midday sun.
